rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF THOMAS IVELI
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. Please have the CASE NUMBER and the CASE NAME ready for the clerk. Parties appearing must check in for the hearing using their FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear in person or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. Please review LRSF 14.1 D. for information on remote appearances. For Zoom appearance: meeting ID is 160 225 4765 and password is 514879. For audio-only telephone appearance via Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF THOMAS IVELI
rulings.Calendar Matter: Breach Of Fiduciary Duty Fraudelent Concealment Constructive Fraud, Aiding And Abetting Breach Of Fiduciary Duty, Claim On Fiduciary Bond Probate Code 2326, Set Aside 15,800,00.00 Judgment Under Ccp 473d And Probate Code 2103, Breach Of Fiduciary Duty By Executor, Fraud Against Knott And Smith. rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/10/25 at Petitioner's request (and no earlier availability). Petitioner did not include other parties in her emailed request for a continuance, so Examiner has not responded to Petitioner's email. (No proposed order has been submitted. A proposed order must be submitted separately and must not be attached to a filed paper.)
